title: Report Definition Contract
description: Phase 2 Program 1c — Strict registry contract for report-service report definitions. All 31+ reports must validate against this schema before semantic RC rules execute. additionalProperties: false locks vocabulary; field names mirror runtime ReportDefinition record (Codex iter-1 absorb — no UI vocabulary rewrite in this PR).

allOf.description: PR-D2.1b/d (ADR-0015, Codex thread 019e83bd iter-2 PARTIAL absorb): remote-http execution adapter exempts the report from the source/sourceQuery requirement, because data comes from another platform service over HTTP rather than the local MSSQL QueryEngine path. SQL kind (default) still requires either source (table name) or sourceQuery (custom SQL).

contractVersion.description: Schema migration signal. v1 = Phase 2 Program 1c baseline.

key.description: Unique slug identifier (e.g. fin-cari-hareketler). Used as registry path.

category.description: Domain bucket (Finans / Satış / İnsan Kaynakları / etc.).

schemaMode.description: Schema resolution mode. 'yearly' triggers yearly partition rotation (yearColumn required — see RC-001 carve-out for COMPANY_REMAINDER schema-encoded snapshots); 'static' uses sourceSchema literally; 'current'/'canonical' reserved for Phase 2 Program 8 schema-truth integration.

yearColumn.description: Column used for yearly partition routing (required when schemaMode=yearly, except the RC-001 COMPANY_REMAINDER schema-encoded-snapshot carve-out).

sourceQuery.description: Custom SQL (alternative to source). Must contain {schema} placeholder for schema-truth substitution.

defaultSort.description: Optional default sort column (must match a column field).

defaultSortDirection.description: Default sort direction. Must be uppercase ASC/DESC (runtime is case-sensitive).

routeSegment.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): optional alias for the web route segment when it differs from the report key (e.g. key 'hr-compensation-detay' aliased to route 'hr-compensation'). Frontend dynamic factory falls back to `key` when absent.

sharedReportId.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): optional legacy SharedReportId carry. Preserves favorites + saved-filter scope + sidebar default + export mode when a static module is retired in favor of this dynamic catalog entry. Frontend favorites sanitizer (report-preferences.ts:48,56) keys off SharedReportId, not route.

filterDefinitions.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): metadata-driven sidebar filter widget contract. When present, the dynamic-report factory renders these widgets in place of the legacy CompanyPicker + search pair. See docs/architecture/dynamic-report-migration-d0.md §4 for the per-module proposed entries.

execution.description: PR-D2.1b/d (ADR-0015): report execution adapter configuration. When absent or kind=sql, the report uses the legacy MSSQL QueryEngine path with source/sourceQuery. When kind=remote-http, the report dispatches to a source-owned adapter (e.g. user-service, permission-service) over an allowlist'li HTTP call. See ExecutionConfig sub-schema for shape.

ExecutionConfig.description: PR-D2.1b/d (ADR-0015, Codex thread 019e83bd iter-2 PARTIAL absorb): execution dispatch metadata. kind='sql' (default, legacy MSSQL QueryEngine) or kind='remote-http' (source-owned adapter via WebClient + allowlist). When kind=remote-http, service/path/responseShape are required and source/sourceQuery on the parent report definition are exempt. When kind=sql, service/path/responseShape must be absent (mutual exclusion enforced).

kind.description: Execution dispatch kind. Matches ExecutionKind enum wire values.

service.description: Remote service name (allowlist key, e.g. 'user-service', 'permission-service'). Required when kind=remote-http; must be absent when kind=sql.

path.description: Remote service path (allowlist key, e.g. '/api/v1/users'). Required when kind=remote-http; must be absent when kind=sql.

responseShape.description: Downstream response normalizer shape. Required when kind=remote-http; must be absent when kind=sql. 'paged-items-total' = {items, total, ...}; 'items-array' = flat array.

allOf.description: sql: service/path/responseShape must be absent (mutual exclusion)

field.description: SQL column name (must match source query result set).

type.description: Display type. PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b) widened from text/number/date to also accept badge/status/currency/boolean/bold-text. link and actions are intentionally OUT of D-chain scope.

sensitive.description: When true, column masked unless user holds the report's sensitive-column grant.

groupable.description: PR-0.2: AG Grid SSRM row-group dimension candidate.

aggregatable.description: PR-0.2: AG Grid SSRM valueCols candidate.

pivotable.description: PR-0.4a (Codex 019e2695 hybrid pivot): column may be dragged into AG Grid's pivot column drop zone. The backend allowlist is authoritative for both server-mode (backend pivot SQL) and client-mode (AG Grid native client pivot).

defaultAggFunc.description: PR-0.2 + PR-0.4z + PR #6a + PR #6b + PR-0.4c: default aggregation function (sum/avg/min/max/count/stddev/stddevp/distinctcount/median/percentilecont/weightedavg). null → sum for numeric, count otherwise.

defaultAggParams.description: PR #6b + PR-0.4c: parametric aggregation defaults. percentilecont expects {"percentile": <double in [0,1]>}. weightedavg expects {"weightField": <name of a visible numeric column>}.

weightField.description: PR-0.4c: weighted-average weight column reference. Must name a visible numeric column on the same report; controller layer enforces type + visibility at request time.

pivotValues.description: PR-0.4b (Codex 019e2695): registry-declared pivot bucket enumeration. Each entry materialises into a backend `CASE WHEN [field] = :value` aggregate; SQL literals bind as named parameters so the predicate stays parametric. Required when pivotable=true and the report enables server-side pivot. Maximum 8 entries — combined cap with valueCols ensures `pivotValues * valueCols <= 32` column budget.

oneOf.description: Short form: SQL value doubles as user-facing label.
Object form: explicit SQL value + display label split.

variantMap.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): badge/enum raw value → variant color tag (e.g. ADMIN → danger).

labelMap.description: PR-D1a: badge/enum raw value → i18n label key (e.g. ADMIN → shared.role.admin).

statusMap.description: PR-D1a: status raw value → typed { variant, labelKey } entry. Frontend status renderer reads both from a single map.

currencyCode.description: PR-D1a: ISO 4217 code (e.g. TRY). Applies when type=currency. Backend does NOT default this; absent → frontend renderer applies 'TRY' fallback.

defaultVariant.description: PR-D1a: badge/status fallback variant when raw value not in variantMap/statusMap.

filterValues.description: PR-D1a: badge/status set filter override. Frontend uses this list as the AG Grid set filter values instead of discovering them from the dataset.

columnRestrictions.description: Map of permission → list of restricted columns.

sourceQueryBoundary.description: RC-004 v2 — declarative company-boundary projection for a sourceQuery report whose physical base table has no company column. The boundary table is INNER JOINed and its company column projected under projectedColumn; RC-004 cross-checks the sourceQuery text against this declaration.

TenantBoundary.description: Phase 2 Program 1c — declarative tenant isolation boundary. Cross-field semantics (boundary mode ↔ schemaMode coupling) enforced by RC-XXX semantic rules; this schema only locks shape.

mode.description: Isolation enforcement layer. 'schema' = schema-name-based (yearly/current); 'row' = row-level filter via rowFilter; 'none' = no tenant scoping (reserved — must justify in reason).

schemaResolver.description: Optional resolver hint (e.g. 'sourceSchemaLiteral', 'yearlyPartitionRotation', 'schemaTruthCanonical'). Build-time documentation only.

reason.description: Mandatory audit trail: why this boundary was chosen. Min 10 chars to discourage placeholder values.

StatusMapEntry.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): per-status entry inside a status column's statusMap. Frontend status renderer reads both fields from a single typed object.

variant.description: Badge variant tag (e.g. success, danger, warning, muted, info, primary).

labelKey.description: i18n key resolved at frontend render time.

FilterOptionEntry.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): inline option entry for enum-select / badge-select filter widgets. Either labelKey (i18n) or label (raw display string) may be present.

FilterOptionsSource.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): dynamic option source for a filter widget. Used when the selectable values must be fetched at runtime.

type.description: Source kind. static → inline options array; endpoint → frontend GETs the URL; filter-values → delegate to the existing /v1/reports/{key}/filter-values endpoint.

FilterDefinition.description: PR-D1a (Codex 019e800b): metadata-driven filter widget contract. See docs/architecture/dynamic-report-migration-d0.md §4 for per-module proposed entries.

key.description: Unique key inside the report's filter state.

targetField.description: Optional backend field this filter targets (defaults to key).

operator.description: Comparison operator emitted into the advanced-filter model.

defaultValue.description: Default value used at filter initialization (any JSON shape — depends on widget kind).

urlParam.description: URL search-param key preserving deep-link behaviour.

i18nLabelKey.description: i18n key for the widget label.

i18nPlaceholderKey.description: Optional i18n key for the widget placeholder.

options.description: Inline option list for enum-select widgets.

advancedFilterTarget.description: Override for the advanced-filter model column key.
